faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our AI education and consulting services

general1.question: What services does Emelmujiro provide?
general1.answer:
Emelmujiro offers a comprehensive range of AI services.

• AI Education & Lectures
• AI Consulting
• AI Agent Development (LLM, RAG, MCP)
• Computer Vision Solutions

We provide end-to-end support from corporate training to technical consulting.

general2.question: How can I request a consultation?
general2.answer: Simply fill out the form on our Contact page, and a representative will reach out as soon as possible. You can also schedule a consultation via phone or email.

education1.question: How are the AI education courses structured?
education1.answer:
We offer courses for all levels, from beginners to experts.

• Python Fundamentals & Data Analysis
• Machine Learning / Deep Learning
• LLM & RAG Applications
• AI Agent Development

All courses are built around a practice-oriented curriculum.

education2.question: Do you offer customized corporate training?
education2.answer: Yes, we provide training customized to your industry and job roles. After an initial meeting to discuss training goals, participant levels, and duration, we design an optimal curriculum.

education3.question: Are courses available online?
education3.answer:
We offer multiple training formats.

• Online (live / recorded)
• Offline
• Hybrid

Training format and practice environment details are provided during consultation.

consulting1.question: In which industries do you offer AI consulting?
consulting1.answer: We provide consulting across various industries including manufacturing, finance, healthcare, and retail. Services include AI adoption strategy, PoC development, model optimization, and MLOps implementation.

consulting2.question: How long does a typical consulting project take?
consulting2.answer:
Timelines vary by project scope and complexity.

• PoC (Proof of Concept): typically 4–8 weeks
• Full implementation: typically 3–6 months

Exact timelines are provided during the initial consultation.

technical1.question: What AI technology stack do you use?
technical1.answer: We leverage cutting-edge AI frameworks and tools including PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face, LangChain, OpenAI API, and Claude API. We select the optimal technology stack based on project requirements.

technical2.question: What is AI agent development?
technical2.answer:
AI systems that autonomously perform tasks based on LLMs (Large Language Models).

• RAG — Retrieval-Augmented Generation
• MCP — Model Context Protocol
• Tool Use — External tool integration

These technologies enable automation of business processes.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.description: Feel free to reach out through our contact page. We'll get back to you promptly.

testimonials.subtitle: REAL REVIEWS
testimonials.title: What Our Students Say
testimonials.cvProgram: Ministry of Employment — AI Computer Vision (CV) Advanced
testimonials.startupProgram: Ministry of Employment — AI/IT Startup Bootcamp
testimonials.cv1: The high proportion of hands-on projects helped me strengthen my skills in a short time. The instructors and managers actively supported us throughout.
testimonials.cv2: I was worried about having no AI background, but the project-based learning environment was designed so you couldn't help but grow with each iteration.
testimonials.cv3: Completing 3 projects in a short time was truly meaningful! Seeing myself grow after each project was so rewarding — a great collaborative experience. The instructors were truly passionate and gave their all.
testimonials.cv4: This AI CV training course was highly rewarding. Building models with real datasets and optimizing performance gave me practical skills. I gained real confidence in the AI computer vision field.
testimonials.startup1: We met great teammates, built our project, and now we're heading to a VC meeting with our deployed service. What an experience!
testimonials.startup2: You get to experience the full cycle — from ideating an MVP to building the product with your own hands. The passionate peers made learning enjoyable.
testimonials.startup3: Development, design, marketing, and business — all experienced within 3 months. Looking back now, I gained far more than I expected.
testimonials.startup4: Unbelievable growth — from team building to MVP. If you dream of being a founder, I strongly recommend this. The follow-up support continues after the program.
testimonials.enterprise1: It wasn't just theory — we built models with our team's actual data, so I could apply what I learned right away after training. The hands-on approach was excellent.
testimonials.enterprise1Source: S Corp. Semiconductor Engineer · ML/DL Advanced
testimonials.enterprise2: Even as a non-developer, I was able to work with data in Python. The instructor explained everything through real workplace examples, which made it much easier to understand.
testimonials.enterprise2Source: H Corp. Manufacturing Engineer · DX Data Analysis
testimonials.enterprise3: After the Spotfire training, I built and now operate a dashboard for my team. Since the exercises used real work data, I could connect it directly to my tasks.
testimonials.enterprise3Source: S Corp. QC Manager · DS Spotfire Data Analysis
testimonials.enterprise4: Computer vision was a totally new field for me, but the step-by-step approach from OpenCV to object detection gave me the foundation to work with image data in my role.
testimonials.enterprise4Source: T Corp. Employee · Computer Vision Hands-on
